title: Value Network Construction — Elevator Guide Rails (NAICS 333921)

sections.title: Market Overview
sections.content: The elevator guide rail market sits within the broader elevator and escalator manufacturing industry (NAICS 333921). Guide rails are safety-critical structural components that guide the elevator car and counterweight through the hoistway. The value network spans from raw steel production (L7) down to the installed elevator system (L4). [SRC: web_search]

sections.title: Value Network Hierarchy (L7 to L4)
sections.content:
| Level | Name | Description | Key Players | Annual Value (Global) |
|-------|------|-------------|-------------|----------------------|
| L7 | Iron ore & coke | Raw material extraction | Vale, Rio Tinto, BHP | $180B |
| L6 | Steel production | Crude steel, billets, blooms | ArcelorMittal, Nippon Steel, POSCO | $950B |
| L5 | Steel profile manufacturing | Rolled/drawn steel profiles incl. T-rails | **ZOLLERN**, Montanstahl, VOL-Stahl, Savera | $12B (profiles segment) |
| L4 | Elevator component manufacturing | Guide rails, machined fittings, brackets | Savera, Monteferro, Hollister-Whitney | $5.4B (guide rail + fittings) |
| L3 | Elevator system assembly | Complete elevator units | Otis, Schindler, KONE, TK Elevator | $85B |
| L2 | Building construction | High-rise, mid-rise, residential | Skanska, Bouygues, China State Construction | $7.5T |
| L1 | Building operation | Facility management, maintenance | CBRE, JLL, building owners | $1.2T |

sections.title: L6 Subsystem: Steel Production
sections.content:
| Sub-Level | Process | Output | Key Suppliers to Guide Rail Chain |
|-----------|---------|--------|----------------------------------|
| L6.1 | Electric arc furnace / BOF | Liquid steel | ArcelorMittal, Salzgitter, voestalpine |
| L6.2 | Continuous casting | Billets, blooms (150x150mm, 200x200mm) | Same as above |
| L6.3 | Hot rolling (roughing) | Structural sections, blooms to beam blanks | Steel mills with section mills |
| L6.4 | Steel trading / distribution | Cut-to-length billets | Kloeckner, Thyssenkrupp Materials |

sections.title: L5 Subsystem: Profile Manufacturing (ZOLLERN Primary Position)
sections.content:
| Sub-Level | Process | Output | ZOLLERN Position | Competitors |
|-----------|---------|--------|-----------------|-------------|
| L5.1 | Profile hot rolling | T-shaped cross-section (T89/B, T127/B) | **PRIMARY** — hot rolling mill in Laucherthal | VOL-Stahl, Montanstahl |
| L5.2 | Straightening | Straightness to 0.5mm/m | **PRIMARY** — roller straightening line | In-house at all competitors |
| L5.3 | Induction hardening | Rail head hardness 50-55 HRC | **PRIMARY** — multi-frequency induction line | VOL-Stahl (subcontracted), Savera (in-house) |
| L5.4 | Cutting to length | 5m standard lengths | **PRIMARY** — CNC saws | Universal capability |
| L5.5 | Quality inspection | Dimensional, hardness, straightness testing | **PRIMARY** | All certified producers |

sections.title: L4 Subsystem: Guide Rail Products
sections.content:
| Component | Standard | Material | Cross-Section | Weight/m | Primary Producers |
|-----------|----------|----------|--------------|----------|------------------|
| T89/B guide rail | ISO 7465 | C45+QT / 50CrMo4 | 89mm web x 62mm base | 8.53 kg/m | Savera, Montanstahl, VOL-Stahl |
| T127/B guide rail | ISO 7465 | C45+QT | 127mm web x 88.9mm base | 16.2 kg/m | Savera, Montanstahl |
| T140/B guide rail | ISO 7465 | C45+QT | 140mm web x 100mm base | 21.6 kg/m | Savera only (large section) |
| Fishplate joints | EN 81-1 | S355 | Various | 0.5-2 kg/piece | Monteferro, Hollister-Whitney |
| Rail clips / brackets | EN 81-1 | S235/S355 | Stamped / forged | 0.3-1 kg/piece | Regional fabricators |

sections.title: ZOLLERN Position in Value Network
sections.content:
ZOLLERN's primary position is at **L5 (Profile Manufacturing)** with vertical integration potential:

| Direction | Current | Opportunity | Feasibility |
|-----------|---------|-------------|-------------|
| Upstream (L6→L5) | Buys billets from steel mills | Vertical integration to billet sourcing | LOW — capital intensive, not core |
| Horizontal (L5 expansion) | T89/B profiles | Add T127/B, T140/B profiles | HIGH — same process, new tooling only |
| Downstream (L5→L4) | Sells raw profiles | Add machined fishplates, bracket systems | MEDIUM — requires CNC investment |
| Downstream (L4→L3) | No presence | Kit assembly (rail + brackets + fishplates) | LOW-MEDIUM — assembly + logistics |
